title: AxAFKZone
description: The ULTIMATE plugin to reward AFK players by creating AFK zones / pools
body:
[![https://i.imgur.com/yuuEoWN.png](https://i.imgur.com/yuuEoWN.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/) 
[![https://i.imgur.com/sfZvOUZ.png](https://i.imgur.com/sfZvOUZ.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)[![https://i.imgur.com/J5G1PON.png](https://i.imgur.com/J5G1PON.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axafkzone.html)
![https://i.imgur.com/vNpF2sw.png](https://i.imgur.com/vNpF2sw.png)
[![https://i.imgur.com/QdKQh8d.png](https://i.imgur.com/QdKQh8d.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axafkzone.html)
<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>


AxAfkZone
The perfect plugin to give AFK rewards to your players

WHAT IS AXAFKZONE?
A lightweight AFK zone/pool plugin. Reward players even when they are AFK. Create an unlimited number of zones, everything is fully customizable.

FEATURES:
Lightweight
The plugin is very performant

3 Time Formats
You can use your favorite

Reward Messages
Notify players about rewards

Unlimited Zones
You can set-up unlimited zones

Smart Reloading
Zones keep data after reloading

Reward Time
Set how often rewards are given

Command Rewards
Run any command as a reward

Item Rewards
Give any item as a reward

Simple Config
Less than 150 lines to configure

Multiple Rewards
You can set-up multipe rewards

Random Rewards
You can set chances to rewards

Builtin Bossbars
Plugin supports bossbar

Builtin Actionbars
Plugin supports actionbar

Chat Messages
Plugin supports chat messages

Permissions
You can set perms to zone usage

Ip Limitations
You can set up number of max users /IP too!

SCROLL DOWN TO SEE MORE
>>

HERE ARE A FEW IMAGES
*images from plugin*

EASY TO CONFIGURE
Easy Setup & Configuration:
Our plugin is really easy to set-up!
The configuration files are so simple and self-explanatory, its as simple as clicking 'join server' in your Minecraft menu.
*images from configuration*

</details>

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
[![https://i.imgur.com/tAaCMRQ.png](https://i.imgur.com/tAaCMRQ.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)
